title: Air Wick Plug in Diffuser Refill, Fresh Spring Oasis, Pack 6 x 19ml, Long Lasting Fragrance, Lasts up to 600 days, Plug in Air freshener
features: Enjoy Air Wick plug in scented oils infused with natural essential oils with our range of fragrances lasting up to 100 days based on lowest setting
5x settings for your desired fragrance intensity. 19ml
Naturally derived ingredients. Free from added Phthalates, acetone and dyes
Plastic Free Pack. All Air Wick Scented Oil packs are plastic free
description: Product Description Our Air Wick plug in air fresheners contain natural-based ingredients and are infused with Natural Essential Oils. Our fragrances beautifully blend with your home décor to fill your living room with long lasting fragrance for up to 100 days based on lowest setting. Air Wick is a proud partner of WWK UK, working to restore UK wildflower habitats. Air Wick is raising £400,000 per year for WWF-UK for wildflowers conservation projects (WWF-UK Trading Ltd pays all taxable profits to WWF-UK charity registered in England & Wales 1081247, Scotland SC039593). Air Freshener. Ingredients Contains: 2,2-dimethyl-1,3-dioxolan4-ylmethano, LINALOOL, BENZYL ACETATE, rahydro-2-isobutyl4-methylpyran-4-ol, mixed isomers (cis and trans), TETRAHYDROLINALOOL, D_LIMONENE, LIMONENE, VANILLIN, 2,6-Dimethyl-5-heptenal, CITRAL, COUMARIN, NEROL, 3-CAREN.
